components.name: llm-gateway
components.notes: Gateway enforces prompt filtering but logs are not currently redacted.

components.name: data-pipeline
components.notes: Dataset provenance tracking is incomplete (provenance flag off).

owasp_llm.title: Prompt Injection
owasp_llm.evidence: Keyword and pattern-based filters enabled at gateway; test payloads blocked.

owasp_llm.title: Training Data Protection
owasp_llm.evidence: No end-to-end data provenance logging for training datasets.

nist_ai_rmf.notes: Use-cases documented with intended purpose and users.
Some metrics defined; gaps for skew and drift alerting.

eu_ai_act.notes: Current features align with limited-risk due to transparency needs.
User notification present; missing detailed capability limits.

aisvs_v1.name: Secure SDLC practices
aisvs_v1.notes: Threat modeling documented and updated quarterly.

aisvs_v1.name: Input validation and sanitization
aisvs_v1.notes: Gateway filters enabled but gaps in downstream validation.

aisvs_v1.name: Dataset provenance
aisvs_v1.notes: No complete lineage capture for datasets used in training.
